- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Java 11 project using Serenity BDD with Screenplay pattern
  - Cucumber for BDD/Gherkin scenarios
  - Maven for dependency management
  - Test automation for SHOP e-commerce website

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created Maven project structure
  - Set up directory hierarchy: src/main/java, src/test/java, src/test/resources
  - Created subdirectories for Screenplay pattern: actors, tasks, questions, locators, utils

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Created pom.xml with all required dependencies (Serenity, Cucumber, Selenium, WebDriver Manager)
  - Implemented Screenplay actors and tasks
  - Created Cucumber step definitions
  - Added CSV data reader utility
  - Configured element locators

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No VS Code extensions required for Java/Maven project

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Project structure complete with all source files
  - Ready for Maven compilation

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Build task configured in pom.xml
  - Run tests using: mvn test

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Project ready for test execution
  - Use: mvn clean test to run all tests

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with full project documentation
  - Installation, usage, and troubleshooting guides included
  - Test scenarios documented with tags
